violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Did not observe employee wash hands after finishing prep with raw meat (suspect hands were wiped on cloth at prep table).

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket in kitchen found with 0ppm chlorine and sani bucket at server station found at 200ppm with soap in solution. *Sanitizer buckets should be maintained at 100ppm and should NOT have soap added to the soltuion..

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Cardboard being used as shelf liners at storage shelves and walk in cooler shelves. -Particle board shelf above dish pit is worn and does not appear to be sealed at the edges.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Black debris and limescale at back corners and ice drop of ice machine. back side of soda machine ice chute. -Minimal black debris at the bottom and back edge of the soda machine ice chute.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue at handles and surfaces of stainless refrigerator. -Containers and interior of stainless refrigerator have crumb/debris build up. -Some debris at walk in freezer fans. -Residue at prep surface at rice cooker. -Residue on curtains at kitchen entrance.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Employee observed washing hands in a ware wash sink. -Employee came in from back door and rinsed hands at 3 comp sink. -Observed employee rinse hands at 3 comp sink after redirection.

Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.--Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. -Both bathroom doors are propped open with door wedges.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Installed, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
